features.description: MCP tool calls over 2min auto-move to background; threshold set via CLAUDE_CODE_MCP_AUTO_BACKGROUND_MS.
features.reference_changelog_line: MCP tool calls running longer than 2 minutes now move to the background automatically so the session stays usable; configure the threshold or disable with `CLAUDE_CODE_MCP_AUTO_BACKGROUND_MS`

features.description: Plan mode no longer auto-runs file-modifying Bash commands without a permission prompt or canUseTool callback.
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed plan mode auto-running file-modifying Bash commands (e.g. `touch`, `rm`) without a permission prompt or SDK `canUseTool` callback

features.description: Worktree creation no longer follows a committed .claude/worktrees symlink to write files outside the repo.
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed worktree creation following a repository-committed symlink at `.claude/worktrees`, which could create files outside the repository

features.description: A continue:false hook halt is no longer dropped when the tool fails or completes mid-stream.
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed a `continue:false` hook's halt being dropped when the tool fails or completes mid-stream, and hook infrastructure errors being misreported as user rejections

features.description: Enterprise forceLoginMethod now enforced for VS Code extension, SDK, setup-token, and install-github-app logins.
features.reference_changelog_line: Changed Enterprise `forceLoginMethod` to be enforced for VS Code extension, SDK, `setup-token`, and `install-github-app` logins, not just the terminal

features.description: Headless/SDK set_model control request now applies mid-turn on the next model round-trip.
features.reference_changelog_line: Changed headless/SDK sessions to apply a `set_model` control request mid-turn; the next model round-trip uses the new model instead of waiting for the next turn

features.description: claude agents --json now reports 'Needs input' (not 'Working') for sessions awaiting a prompt.
features.reference_changelog_line: Changed agent view / `claude agents --json`: sessions waiting on a sandbox, MCP-input, or managed-settings prompt now show as "Needs input" instead of "Working"

features.description: /fork now copies conversation into a new background session; the old in-session subagent is now /subtask.
features.reference_changelog_line: `/fork` now copies your conversation into a new background session (its own row in `claude agents`) while you keep working; the in-session subagent it used to launch is now `/subtask`

features.description: New `claude auto-mode reset` command restores default auto-mode config (confirmation prompt; --yes skips).
features.reference_changelog_line: Added `claude auto-mode reset` to restore the default auto-mode configuration, with a confirmation prompt (pass `--yes` to skip)

features.description: Task tool's mode parameter is deprecated/ignored; subagents inherit the parent session's permission mode.
features.reference_changelog_line: Deprecated the Task tool's `mode` parameter (now ignored); subagents inherit the parent session's permission mode by default

features.description: New per-session WebSearch cap (default 200) via CLAUDE_CODE_MAX_WEB_SEARCHES_PER_SESSION.
features.reference_changelog_line: Added a session-wide limit on WebSearch tool calls (default 200, tunable via `CLAUDE_CODE_MAX_WEB_SEARCHES_PER_SESSION`) to stop runaway search loops

features.description: New per-session subagent spawn cap (default 200) via CLAUDE_CODE_MAX_SUBAGENTS_PER_SESSION; /clear resets it.
features.reference_changelog_line: Added a per-session cap on subagent spawns (default 200, override with `CLAUDE_CODE_MAX_SUBAGENTS_PER_SESSION`) to stop runaway delegation loops; `/clear` resets the budget

features.description: Session transcripts now record the reasoning effort level on each assistant message.
features.reference_changelog_line: Changed session transcripts to record the reasoning effort level on each assistant message
